return(function(...)local 102\113\086\070\101\113\090\087\055\122\109\116\061\061","\075\056\061\061";"\088\080\121\079","\065\056\061\061","\052\075\097\074\111\072\065\061";"\084\106\088\098\049\106\113\121\116\071\048\061";"\055\090\053\068\122\100\077\071\066\083\080\083\108\118\076\103\083\115\066\068\097\052\061\061";"\084\077\065\072\106\098\107\110\099\117\061\061";"\088\072\066\107\084\072\122\061";"\050\056\061\061","\107\118\110\111\053\072\057\117\049\083\097\074","\102\086\101\118\073\086\074\072\106\055\118\080","\111\106\085\065\122\106\085\047\088\071\105\076\097\116\061\061","\049\087\057\077\056\100\108\069\072\071\052\080\113\118\090\101\097\104\106\081","\101\088\098\056\072\047\078\118\098\066\100\055","\098\103\070\088\083\077\122\112\079\067\117\099\068\056\061\061";"\052\121\106\070","\082\117\061\061","\070\052\061\061","\101\049\057\105\074\051\051\051\043\090\122\061";"\081\066\086\114\111\067\101\100\117\115\121\075\074\117\061\061","\054\052\061\061";"\080\079\077\090\080\114\104\087\121\080\043\102";"\072\074\086\082";"\108\050\083\076\097\068\089\101\051\074\109\056","\077\117\061\061";"\111\075\048\078\099\055\104\115\048\111\048\061";"\111\072\105\068\100\106\099\073\084\071\085\076\088\117\061\061","\049\114\071\118\068\114\110\050\115\113\072\100","\087\100\099\071\098\120\050\065\118\043\115\107\115\104\073\122\075\088\054\078";"\069\100\072\086\051\110\078\089","\103\088\056\065\102\065\065\047","\101\086\072\100\085\069\108\072\075\052\061\061","\075\114\102\110\108\057\071\088\100\106\075\117\048\116\061\061","\047\081\110\053\120\054\085\086\077\069\116\061";"\065\114\085\049\079\119\115\122\084\106\067\075\114\056\061\061","\047\054\053\087\088\099\105\106";"\078\100\081\122\112\080\101\061","\057\116\061\061";"\081\049\080\075\075\076\050\105\073\077\050\050\070\084\116\111\070\119\108\111\054\056\056\061","\053\050\067\088\098\117\061\061";"\069\116\061\061","\116\106\067\067\084\071\088\105\122\078\111\067\088\072\122\061";"\109\082\088\107\104\105
